final:
module sync_binary_counter (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input en,
    input load,
    input [3:0] load_value,
    output reg [3:0] count);
  wire _tap_clk = clk & {1{1'b1}};


    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (rst) begin
            count <= 4'b0;
        end else if (load) begin
            count <= load_value;
        end else if (en) begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end
endmodule
